data.body: FIXED (commit 9760b2b2). (1) Sandboxed TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR on the 3 no-args arity invocations; proved behavior-preserving (same usage+exit 1) and no-leak in a fresh-git-repo simulation (WITHOUT env -> leaks; WITH env -> no leak). (2) CI pytest step now pins --basetemp=${{ runner.temp }}/rebar-basetemp + -p no:cacheprovider. The 3 patched suites pass via the collector (3 passed). Standalone pre-Tier-E hygiene commit; unblocks CI green on push.
